scripts.build: pnpm build:deps && pnpm prepare:dsd && vite build
scripts.build:deps: pnpm -w build:native && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/core build && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/runtime build && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/motion build && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/compiler build && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/router build && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/vite build && pnpm --filter @naos-ui/primitives build
scripts.test: pnpm build:deps && pnpm prepare:dsd && playwright test
